channel.title: Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Critter Stack 2026 Releases are Underway
item.description: Pardon the mess, but the Critter Stack 2026 releases are heavily underway in the JasperFx GitHub Organization. Busy enough that I am getting hit with GitHub rate limiting messages the past couple days and I think that’s a good sign about our productivity? It’s also blessedly coincided with a couple very quiet days in the … Continue reading Critter Stack 2026 Releases are Underway → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/05/13/critter-stack-2026-releases-are-underway/

item.title: Wolverine Middleware and Some Random Observations
item.description: This post is ostensibly about a sample usage of Wolverine middleware, but I’m going to meander a bit. I’m working pretty hard this week trying to make some serious progress on CritterWatch, our long planned production monitoring and management console for the “Critter Stack.” At one point late in the day I was working to … Continue reading Wolverine Middleware and Some Random Observations → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/05/05/wolverine-middleware-and-some-random-observations/
